# Wiki Fixtures

Large benchmark fixtures are local-only and are not tracked in git.

Files:
- `enwik8`
- `enwik9`

To download them locally, run:

```bash
bash tests/fixtures/wiki/download.sh
```

Source URLs:
- `https://mattmahoney.net/dc/enwik8.zip`
- `https://mattmahoney.net/dc/enwik9.zip`

The script downloads the `.zip` files and extracts the raw fixture files into this directory.
